title: Graduates boo commencement speech about AI in Florida
description: The commencement speaker at the University of Central Florida hit a nerve when she talked about artificial intelligence.
content:
The crowd booed.
“What happened?” Caulfield stammered, looking over her shoulder, as if searching for an escape hatch. “OK, I struck a chord! May I finish? Only a few years ago, AI was not a factor in our lives.”
The crowd erupted in cheers.
“And now... [4192 chars]

title: "AI should complement humans, not replace them": Former NITI Aaayog member Arvind Virmani on India's AI strategy
description: India should use Artificial Intelligence (AI) to enhance human productivity rather than replace workers, said Former NITI Aayog member Arvind Virmani on Sunday. He argued that the country's strength lies in combining AI with its large workforce instead of aggressively pursuing robotics-led automation.
content: New Delhi [India], May 17 (ANI): India should use Artificial Intelligence (AI) to enhance human productivity rather than replace workers, said Former NITI Aayog member Arvind Virmani on Sunday. He argued that the country's strength lies in combining ... [3217 chars]

title: ICAI to embed AI, data analytics in CA curriculum
description: The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India will integrate artificial intelligence and data analytics into its curriculum. This move aims to equip students for evolving technological and professional landscapes. A committee is reviewing the syllabus and training. Updates are expected to be implemented by 2028.
